overall.description: A hooded character in a white cloak walks through a mountain valley at sunset in this cinematic game engine footage. The character traverses a shallow stream bed toward distant stone ruins while golden light filters through scattered clouds, creating a dramatic backlit silhouette.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow stream bed toward the distant ruins

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left valley wall
steep rocky cliff face forming the right valley wall
ancient stone archway ruins silhouetted against the sunset
tall grass and reeds growing along the stream bank
rocky stream bed with shallow water reflecting the golden light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a hooded character walking through a narrow mountain valley. The path follows a shallow stream bed between steep rocky cliffs, with tall reeds lining the right bank. In the distance, ancient stone ruins are silhouetted against a dramatic golden-hour sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the stream bed as the valley opens slightly toward the ruins

entered.detail: large scattered boulders along the left stream bank
rocks and stones visible in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the right cliff face falls out of view and the valley opens slightly. The stone archway ruins grow larger in the frame, moving from the mid-ground to the near-ground. The path remains a shallow rocky stream, with boulders becoming more prominent along the banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain valley that gradually opens up toward ancient stone ruins. It begins by trailing a hooded character walking along a shallow stream bed, flanked by steep rocky cliffs and tall reeds under a dramatic golden-hour sky. As the character progresses, the right cliff face recedes from view and the valley expands, allowing the distant ruins to grow larger in the frame. The scene then shifts from a confined passage to a more open landscape, where the rocky path becomes punctuated by prominent boulders as the stone archways move from the mid-ground into the near-ground.
